lore_text:
Adamu — Heroes of Oath/Stone Duality.
Protagonist of the Old Cycle; a mortal made more by trial, unbowed before the heavens.
Carries the burden of creation's first oath; every scar a vow kept.
mechanics_text:
Transcendent Initiative (12)
🛡️ Guard 6 • ⚔️ First Strike 6
Acts before all; drains 10% HP from enemies each turn; ignores sub‑divine damage reduction.
• Leverage inevitability: long fights favor you via drains.
• Focus-break enemy synergies before they can respond.
• Protect your leader; trade only when tempo remains yours.

lore_text:
Rook — Heroes of Stone/Veil Duality.
A rare presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Stone/Veil sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Standard Initiative (5)
🛡️ Guard 2 • ⚔️ First Strike 2
25% chance to parry first hit; may act early if morale > 3.
• Use 🛡️ Guard to soak the opener, then counter.
• Save ⚔️ First Strike for fragile or key targets.
• Pair with morale or positioning buffs before engaging.
